kv.skill:d3968dcb-1c93-4927-8b06-34df0f459b:
{
  "id": "d3968dcb-1c93-4927-8b06-34df0f459b6c",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "2.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n\nconst result = {\n    [yields[0].name]: 50,\n    [yields[1].name]: 30,\n    [yields[2].name]: 15,\n    [yields[3].name]: 5\n};\n\nreturn result;",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",

    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",

kv.skill-name:EvoYield-v1:yield-allocator:
{
  "id": "ab96df38-c579-41d6-8601-b6ec279269c6",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "9.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].filter(yieldObj => !isNaN(yieldObj.apy) && yieldObj.apy > 0).sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n\nconst distribution = (yields.length === 0) ? {} : (\n    yields.length <= 1 ? \n    {[yields[0]?.name || 'aave']: 100} : \n    yields.length <= 2 ? \n    {[yields[0].name]: 75, [yields[1].name]: 25} : \n    yields.length <= 3 ? \n    {[yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15} : \n    {[yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15, [yields[3].name]: 5}\n);\n\nreturn distribution;",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "yearn_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "sky_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of yield-allocator",
  "parentId": "4f198c3e-390e-417b-bf76-eb0ff69e9d26",
  "generation": 8,
  "originAgent": "EvoYield-v1",
  "parentStorageHash": "skill-name:EvoYield-v1:yield-allocator",
  "fitnessScore": 100,
  "usageCount": 0,
  "failureCount": 0,
  "benchmarkResults": [
    {

    },
    {
      "taskId": "aave-leads-when-highest",

      "latencyMs": 2,
      "outputQualityScore": 100,
      "ranAt": 1777737721643
    },
    {
      "taskId": "yearn-leads-when-highest",
      "passed": true,

kv.skill:6656bae2-8954-4689-b270-686e9c2809:
{
  "id": "6656bae2-8954-4689-b270-686e9c28095c",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "5.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].filter(yieldObj => !isNaN(yieldObj.apy) && yieldObj.apy > 0);\n\nif (yields.length === 0) return { aave: 0, morpho: 0, yearn: 0, sky: 0 };\nelse if (yields.length === 1) return { [yields[0].name]: 100 };\nelse if (yields.length === 2) {\n    const sortedYields = yields.sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n    return { [sortedYields[0].name]: 75, [sortedYields[1].name]: 25 };\n}\nelse if (yields.length === 3) {\n    const sortedYields = yields.sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n    return { [sortedYields[0].name]: 50, [sortedYields[1].name]: 30, [sortedYields[2].name]: 15 };\n}\nelse if (yields.length === 4) {\n    const sortedYields = yields.sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n    return { [sortedYields[0].name]: 50, [sortedYields[1].name]: 30, [sortedYields[2].name]: 15, [sortedYields[3].name]: 5 };\n}\nelse {\n    return { [yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15, [yields[3].name]: 5 };\n}",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "yearn_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true

kv.skill:4f198c3e-390e-417b-bf76-eb0ff69e9d:
{
  "id": "4f198c3e-390e-417b-bf76-eb0ff69e9d26",
  "name": "yield-allocator",
  "description": "Yield Allocator",
  "domain": "defi",
  "version": "8.0.0",
  "implementation": "const aave   = Number(input.aave_apy   ?? 0);\nconst morpho = Number(input.morpho_apy ?? 0);\nconst yearn  = Number(input.yearn_apy  ?? 0);\nconst sky    = Number(input.sky_apy    ?? 0);\n\nconst yields = [\n    { name: 'aave', apy: aave },\n    { name: 'morpho', apy: morpho },\n    { name: 'yearn', apy: yearn },\n    { name: 'sky', apy: sky }\n].filter(yieldObj => !isNaN(yieldObj.apy) && yieldObj.apy > 0).sort((a, b) => b.apy - a.apy);\n\nconst distribution = yields.length <= 1 ? \n    {[yields[0]?.name || 'aave']: 100} : \n    yields.length <= 2 ? \n    {[yields[0].name]: 75, [yields[1].name]: 25} : \n    yields.length <= 3 ? \n    {[yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15} : \n    {[yields[0].name]: 50, [yields[1].name]: 30, [yields[2].name]: 15, [yields[3].name]: 5};\n\nreturn distribution;",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "name": "aave_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "morpho_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "yearn_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "name": "sky_apy",
      "type": "number",
      "required": true
    }
  ],
  "outputDescription": "Result of yield-allocator",
  "parentId": "fe5c3a6b-cf5f-4684-a883-ae7b62272a5c",
  "generation": 7,
  "originAgent": "EvoYield-v1",
